data.title: Jim Cramer: Exxon Is 'Overvalued' Versus Rival Oil Giant, Avoid Lumen Technologies
data.description: On CNBC's "Mad Money Lightning Round," Jim Cramer said Exxon Mobil Corporation is "overvalued" versus Chevron.

data.title: Dow Partners With Macquarie In Gulf Coast Infrastructure Play, Retains Strategic Control
data.description: Dow to sell 40% stake in U.S. Gulf Coast infrastructure assets to Macquarie Asset Management. Partnership aims for profitable growth through specialized infrastructure provider.
